main.description: Declare (add or update) one of the calling app's categories for a user, without disturbing the others. Self-scoped management write (app JWT + a fresh `userToken`, like setRouting). Requires an active grant.

userToken.description: A user-issued service-auth JWT (aud = relay DID, lxm = pub.atmo.notify.addCategory).

title.description: Human display name (e.g. a webhook's name).

route.description: Optional initial route: a '+'-joined token set, 'off', 'inbox', or 'app' to inherit the app-wide route. Omit to leave routing unchanged.
